Off Calendar Jan-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. GENER D. BENITEZ of Ibarra Professional Law Corporation, Tel No. (415) 398-5329 appearing for Plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant 39-41 Lake Street Homeowners Association's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. The Demurrer is overruled for failure to comply with Civ. Code Sec. 5950. The Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the first four causes of action. Plaintiff has ten days leave to amend to clarify in what capacity these claims are asserted against Defendant. Finally, the Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the ninth cause of action, because the allegations made do not support a cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
